commitments: Your health data is sovereign — you own it, can export it, can delete it, can leave anytime
We never sell, share, or broker your data. Period.
Transparent pricing — what you pay is what we charge, less payment processing
AI recommendations are explainable — you see why your plan was created this way
24-hour response time for all support requests
No dark patterns — no guilt trips, no fake urgency, no manipulative nudges
Your agent can access your data on your behalf. We serve your agent like we serve you.
note: These are real commitments to real customers. ManVsHealth is a running business, not a demo.
